---
title: "Real Good Data"
subtitle: "Sharing our data to help you do good things better."
title-block: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="catalogue-shell">

  <section class="toolbar" aria-label="Collection search">
    <div class="toolbar-group search">
      <div class="search-row">
        <input id="search-input" type="text" placeholder="Search for the data you need...">
        <button
          id="token-trigger"
          class="token-trigger button-secondary"
          type="button"
          aria-label="Provide access token to unlock restricted data."
          title="Provide access token to unlock restricted data.">
          <span aria-hidden="true">🔒</span>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section id="collection-list" class="collection-grid" aria-live="polite"></section>
</div>

<div id="token-modal" class="token-modal hidden" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="token-modal-backdrop" data-close-modal="true"></div>
  <div class="token-modal-dialog" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="token-modal-title">
    <div class="token-modal-header">
      <h2 id="token-modal-title">Restricted Data Access</h2>
      <button id="token-modal-close" class="button-secondary modal-close" type="button" aria-label="Close">
        <span aria-hidden="true">×</span>
      </button>
    </div>
    <p class="sidebar-copy">Provide access token to unlock restricted data.</p>
    <div class="token-panel modal-token-panel">
      <label class="field-label" for="token-input">Access token</label>
      <input id="token-input" type="password" placeholder="Paste token here">
      <div class="token-actions">
        <button id="apply-token" class="button-primary" type="button">Apply</button>
        <button id="clear-token" class="button-secondary" type="button">Clear</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

<script src="assets/catalog.js"></script>
